name: part_009
file: tmp_【#白銀ノエル生誕祭2025】生誕 3D LIVE 睡夢 - suimu -【白銀ノエル⧸ホロライブ】 [eV59GTk0J3s]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_009.webm

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel performs 'Tres Bien Night' solo on a colorful neon-lit stage.
Transition scene with stage lights and audience cheering.
Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare, and Usada Pekora perform 'Kaguya no Shiro de Odoritai' together.

subtitles.original: もっともっともっともっとまだまだ足りない
subtitles.english: More, more, more, more, it's still not enough

subtitles.original: 本日は欲望解放パーティーナイト
subtitles.english: Tonight is a desire-releasing party night

subtitles.original: 乾杯！
subtitles.english: Cheers!

subtitles.original: トレビアン　御褒美頂戴
subtitles.english: Très bien, give me a reward

subtitles.original: てんてこ舞いなリズムにバイバイしちゃえ
subtitles.english: Say bye-bye to this hectic rhythm

subtitles.original: トレヴィ　驚異御礼
subtitles.english: Très vie, thanks for the wonders

subtitles.original: ぎゅうぎゅうと詰め込んじゃえ　どんどんフリーダム

subtitles.original: ハッハ！
subtitles.english: Ha-ha!

subtitles.original: おいで！おいで！誘惑のDance again

subtitles.english: Come on! Come on! To Kaguya's Castle

subtitles.original: 出逢いがあやつるミステリー
subtitles.english: A mystery controlled by our meeting

subtitles.original: 危険なペルソナ
subtitles.english: A dangerous persona

subtitles.original: 踊ろう！踊ろう！終わらないDance beat
subtitles.english: Let's dance! Let's dance! An endless Dance beat

subtitles.original: 踊ろうよ踊ろう！輝夜の城で
subtitles.english: Let's dance, let's dance! In Kaguya's Castle

subtitles.original: 夜空を切りとるレーザービーム
subtitles.english: Laser beams cutting through the night sky

subtitles.original: 私を見てよ
subtitles.english: Look at me

subtitles.original: まばゆい星が照らす想い
subtitles.english: Feelings illuminated by dazzling stars

subtitles.original: 今宵の夢よ永遠に
subtitles.english: May tonight's dream last forever

subtitles.original: 明日のことは忘れたいの
subtitles.english: I want to forget about tomorrow

subtitles.original: ニパ！
subtitles.english: Nipa!

subtitles.original: 優しくさらわれたい
subtitles.english: I want to be gently whisked away

subtitles.original: そっと囁いて
subtitles.english: Whisper softly

subtitles.original: 意味ありげに目をそらす

subtitles.original: 触れた手がまだ熱い
subtitles.english: Your touch is still burning

subtitles.original: のがさずに抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Hold me tight and don't let go

subtitles.original: この奇跡を恋と呼ぶのね
subtitles.english: We call this miracle love, don't we?

subtitles.english: Let me join in too?

subtitles.original: Flare: 一緒に行こう。ついてきて。
subtitles.english: Flare: Let's go together. Follow me.

subtitles.english: Marine: Don't look at other people. Look only at me.

subtitles.english: Pekora: You'll regret it. Let's have fun.

subtitles.original: Noel: 早くしなさいよ。鈍いのですね。いいの。
